stemHtml: Select the statement that represents the LEAST IDEAL condition when a fuel-cooled oil cooler experiences leakage from excessive system pressure in an axial compressor turbine engine or turboprop.

options.a: Leaking oil coolant over the compressor blades that mixes with hot fuel.
options.b: Leaking hot fuel mixing with the oil over the turbines.
options.d: Hot fuel leaking through drain tube or onto combustion casing.
